de.uka.ilkd.key.java.expression.literal

  • java.lang.Object

    Expression, ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, TerminalProgramElement, SVSubstitute

    public class BooleanLiteral
extends Literal
    Boolean literal.

    • Method Detail

      • getBooleanLiteral

        public static BooleanLiteral getBooleanLiteral(boolean val)
        get boolean literal for the given value. This supports use of single literals, but we do not force it.
        Parameters:
        val - a boolean specifying the literal to be returned
        Returns:
        the BooleanLiteral representing val
